summary: Leaderboard V2 (3-level gamification) testing complete. Backend: 20/21 tests passed (95%). All 3 levels work: Store returns users with scores/badges/team_summary, Org returns store rankings, Global returns anonymized users with your_rank. Month/year and category filters work correctly. Minor issue: invalid user_id returns 500 instead of 404 (ObjectId conversion crash). Frontend: Leaderboard page fully functional with level tabs, category pills, month selector, entry cards with expand, and team summary footer. My Account page has 'Leaderboard' quick action button with trophy icon.

minor.issue: Returns 500 instead of 404/422 when user_id is not a valid ObjectId format

issues: Minor: refreshUserData API call returns 405 (Method Not Allowed) - non-blocking but logged in console

action_items: OPTIONAL: Add try/except around ObjectId(user_id) in leaderboard_v2.py to return 404 for invalid IDs instead of 500
critical_code_review_comments: leaderboard_v2.py: CATEGORIES dict correctly maps event types to 6 categories (digital_cards, reviews, congrats, emails, sms, voice_notes)
leaderboard_v2.py: _build_date_filter() at line 29 correctly handles month/year filtering with timezone-aware datetime
leaderboard_v2.py: _rank_users() at line 81 assigns badges correctly - gold/silver/bronze for ranks 1-3, null for others
leaderboard_v2.py: Global endpoint anonymizes names with initials (e.g., 'F. W.') and sets photo=None at lines 254-257
leaderboard_v2.py: your_rank field correctly finds requesting user's position at line 260
Frontend leaderboard/index.tsx: Uses AsyncStorage to get user._id for API calls at line 39
Frontend leaderboard/index.tsx: Correct level switching with loadData() callback at line 42-56
Frontend api.ts: leaderboardAPI correctly builds query params for month/year/category filters at lines 779-804
Frontend my-account.tsx: Leaderboard quick action button at line 541-549 with trophy icon and gold color

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All UI components render and function correctly

seed_data_creation: Used existing Forest user with 49 contact_events in Feb 2026
context_for_next_testing_agent: Leaderboard V2 fully tested in iteration 53. Backend endpoints: GET /api/leaderboard/v2/store/{user_id}, GET /api/leaderboard/v2/org/{user_id}, GET /api/leaderboard/v2/global/{user_id}. All support ?month=N&year=YYYY&category=X params. Frontend: /leaderboard page with level tabs (My Store, All Stores, Global), category pills, month selector, expandable entry cards, team summary footer. My Account page has Leaderboard quick action button.
